summary: Iteration 44 - Real-User Testing Preparation Phase Complete. All 3 new features tested and working: (1) Admin analytics page at /admin with KPIs, DAU chart, retention metrics, and feedback list. (2) Floating feedback button visible on all 6 tabs with modal for type selection and text input. (3) 3-step onboarding flow with Hebrew RTL UI, direction selection, and send-to-globe action. All regression tests pass including Globe on HomeTab and Circle detail view.
critical_code_review_comments: All new data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
RTL Hebrew UI correctly applied in onboarding and feedback modals
Admin page loads analytics from /api/admin/analytics and feedback from /api/admin/feedback
Feedback button uses fixed position bottom-left (16px left, 960px top) on all tabs
Onboarding localStorage key 'philos_onboarding_complete' properly set after completion
Globe visible on HomeTab - FieldGlobeSection renders correctly above fold
seed_data_creation: Test feedback items created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real-user testing prep features complete. New backend endpoints: GET /api/admin/analytics (returns dau array, retention d1/d7, totals), GET /api/admin/feedback (returns feedback array), POST /api/feedback (stores feedback with type/text/page), POST /api/onboarding/first-action (records direction and adds globe point). New frontend testids: admin-page, admin-kpi-cards, admin-retention, admin-dau-chart, admin-feedback, admin-back-to-app, dau-row-{n}, feedback-item-{n}, feedback-floating-btn, feedback-modal, feedback-type-selector, feedback-type-{confusion|improvement|bug}, feedback-text-input, feedback-submit-btn, feedback-success, feedback-close, onboarding-overlay, onboarding-modal, onboarding-title, onboarding-next, onboarding-skip, onboarding-direction-{contribution|recovery|order|exploration}, onboarding-send-to-globe. localStorage key: philos_onboarding_complete. Admin URL: /admin route hidden from main nav.

TestAdminAnalytics.test_admin_analytics_has_retention: PASS (d1 and d7 with cohort_size, returned, rate)

Onboarding_Flow.step_1_welcome: PASS - Shows 'ברוך הבא ל-Philos' with Next/Skip buttons
Onboarding_Flow.step_2_direction_selection: PASS - Shows 4 directions (תרומה/התאוששות/סדר/חקירה), Next disabled until selection

Admin_Page.kpi_cards: PASS - Total Users, Total Actions, DAU Today, Actions/User
Admin_Page.retention_section: PASS - D1 and D7 retention with rates

GET /api/admin/analytics.dau: 7 days array with active_users and actions_per_user
